reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the bug you encountered! To help us fix this immediately, please email support@fantachat.ai with your UID and a description or screenshot of the issue. We are prioritizing technical fixes and want to ensure you have a smooth experience. Thank you for your patience!
reply_zh: 你好！对于您遇到的漏洞，我深表歉意！为了帮助我们立即修复此问题，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并附上您的 UID 以及问题的描述或截图。我们正在优先处理技术修复，并希望确保您拥有流畅的使用体验。感谢您的耐心等待！
